tools.name: configuration.affiliationById
tools.description: Returns associated data for the specified affiliation Id, like name and implementation, for example.

tools.name: configuration.affiliations
tools.description: Returns all affiliations that your provider can handle.

tools.name: configuration.availablePaymentMethods
tools.description: Returns enabled payment methods, like visa, master, bankissueinvoice that are shown for the final user and enabled to receive payment.

tools.name: configuration.insertAffiliation
tools.description: Creates a new affiliation and returns a successful response.

tools.name: configuration.insertRule
tools.description: Creates a new rule and returns a successful response.

tools.name: configuration.putRuleById
tools.description: Update Rule.

tools.name: configuration.rule
tools.description: Deletes rules by specified Id.

tools.name: configuration.ruleById
tools.description: Returns rule by specified RuleId.

tools.name: configuration.rules
tools.description: Returns all rules conditions your provider can handle.

tools.name: configuration.updateAffiliation
tools.description: Returns all affiliations.

tools.name: installments.installmentsoptions
tools.description: Returns the best installment options according to the informed params.

tools.name: transactionFlow.cancelthetransaction
tools.description: Cancel's transaction that was previously approved, but not settled.

tools.name: transactionFlow.refundthetransaction
tools.description: Refunds transaction's value that was previously settled.

tools.name: transactionFlow.settlethetransaction
tools.description: Settles transaction's value.

tools.name: transactionProcess.1Createanewtransaction
tools.description: This request is the first step to create a new transaction.

tools.name: transactionProcess.2SendPaymentsPublic
tools.description: The second step to create a new transaction. Here, you have the option to send the data in three diferent ways: doing a private request, a public request or a private request that uses a saved Credit Card.

tools.name: transactionProcess.2SendPaymentsWithSavedCreditCard
tools.description: The second step to create a new transaction. Here, you have the option to send the data in three diferent ways: doing a private request, a public request or a private request that uses a saved Credit Card.

tools.name: transactionProcess.3SendAdditionalData
tools.description: The third step to create a new transaction. It will send the additional related data to the transaction, like billig and shipping adress.

tools.name: transactionProcess.4Doauthorization
tools.description: The fouth and last step to create a new transaction. It will authorized the new transction creation acorrdint to the data previously informed in the latests requests.

tools.name: transactionProcess.paymentDetails
tools.description: Returns associated information details for the specified payment id.

tools.name: transactionProcess.transactionDetails
tools.description: Returns associated data for the specified transaction id, like value and status, for exemple.

tools.name: transactionProcess.transactionSettlementDetails
tools.description: Returns associated settlements data for the specified transaction id.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
